prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Major Depressive Disorder
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~20 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 60.8 kg; Height 167.3 cm; BMI 21.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.7%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 7.0%), FPG (12 months ago 205mg/dL; 9 months ago 215mg/dL; 6 months ago 185mg/dL; 3 months ago 187mg/dL; current 182mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 58.3kg; 9 months ago 59.3kg; 6 months ago 60.2kg; 3 months ago 57.9kg; current 60.8kg), Height (12 months ago 167.3cm; 9 months ago 167.3cm; 6 months ago 167.3cm; 3 months ago 167.3cm; current 167.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 124mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 130mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 131U/L; 9 months ago 139U/L; 6 months ago 139U/L; 3 months ago 140U/L; current 127U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 93U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 103U/L; current 91U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; current 55mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 105mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 124mg/g; 3 months ago 113mg/g; current 96mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 101mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 98mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 48mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 130mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 140mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.00 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
